summary: First-pass conformance fixes were applied without seed data. Route contracts, create flow, detail/dashboard surfaces, public CTA, and bilateral-confirmation settlement wiring were updated and locally validated.
source_invariants: Vouch is commitment-backed payment coordination only.
Both participants confirm inside the window before funds release.
If confirmation conditions fail, funds do not release.
Stripe owns payment truth; Vouch owns workflow truth.
No disputes, evidence, mediation, arbitration, manual awards, support overrides, marketplace discovery, messaging, reviews, ratings, browse, search, or public provider profiles.
do_not_reintroduce: manual settlement or support override behavior
next_handoff_instruction: Continue with any remaining non-first-pass cleanup separately. Do not add seed data unless explicitly requested.
